comment: Coverage baseline for src/workflow, captured 2026-05-31 from an isolated worktree (817/817 green) via `node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='src/workflow/**'`. This is the phase-4 DoD artifact for the gate-governance finish goal. Coverage uses Node's built-in --experimental-test-coverage (NOT c8) — see DECISIONS.md.

thresholds.comment: Conservative floors that guard against regression without forcing tautological tests on already-covered code. Branch is intentionally NOT gated (70.89% baseline is noisy across many defensive branches). Raise only when real coverage rises.

real_gaps.comment: Modules genuinely worth new tests. NOT the 17 'no dedicated test file' modules — 16 of those are already ≥70% line via indirect coverage; writing dedicated tests for them would be tautological. These are the real low-coverage targets.

plan-generator.js.note: absent from coverage table = never loaded by any test; the one truly-zero-coverage module

closeout-validation.js.note: lowest real covered module; it is a closeout gate validator, so the gap matters

branch_gaps.comment: Lowest branch coverage — candidates for error-path tests in phase 6.
